body.title: Remove Igor safe_mode watchdog entirely
body.result: safe_mode.py deleted; trip() + _safe_mode_triggered removed from coa.py; test_safe_mode.py deleted; 405 lines gone
body.description:
**Problem:** safe_mode.py watchdog treats the symptom (NE stuck cycles) instead of the root cause (boredom/idle loop not triggering background goals). It also writes a persistent flag that blocks Igor's capabilities and requires human intervention to clear — exactly backwards from self-healing.

**What to do:** Delete or hollow out `devices/igor/cognition/safe_mode.py`. Remove the `trip()` call sites in COA/NE. The flag was already cleared manually (2026-06-06). The actual fix for Igor getting bored is a separate ticket (T-igor-boredom-background-goals).

**Affected files:** devices/igor/cognition/safe_mode.py, wherever trip() is called (COA, NE), igor.switches.cfg (IGOR_SAFE_MODE line already cleared)
**Design rules:** none
**Scope boundary:** Remove the watchdog mechanism. Do NOT touch the boredom/background-goal fix — that's a separate ticket.
**Completion criteria:** safe_mode.py calls/imports removed from COA/NE; no IGOR_SAFE_MODE flag written anywhere; tests still pass.
